title: Polymath Tradeoff Matrix frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of a docs/decisions/<slug>-tradeoff.md authored by polymath-decisions:tradeoff-matrix. The skill enforces 'criteria differentiate' and 'math shown per cell'; the schema enforces the catalogued shape so workflows can mustPass-validate the artifact.

options_count.description: Number of options the matrix compares. Recommended ≥ 2; a single-option 'matrix' is not a tradeoff. Strong gates MAY enforce minimum: 2.

criteria_count.description: Number of criteria the matrix scores. Recommended ≥ 3 so the scoring has discriminating power; a 1-criterion matrix is a single-axis ranking.

decision.description: Optional pointer to the DACIDecision artifact that consumes this matrix.

would_flip_when.description: One-line description of the future condition that would change the recommended option. Falsifiability anchor for the decision.
